name: Field-Aware RankMixer with Dual-Stream Bilinear Fusion for the Tencent UNI-REC Challenge
summary: arXiv:2607.15590v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper presents our solution to the KDD Cup 2026 Tencent UNIREC Challenge. The task requires joint modeling of multi-domain user behavior seque...
description: arXiv:2607.15590v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper presents our solution to the KDD Cup 2026 Tencent UNIREC Challenge. The task requires joint modeling of multi-domain user behavior sequences and non-sequential multi-field features for target-ad pCVR prediction. We develop a Field-Aware RankMixer (FA-RankMixer) with dual-stream bilinear fusion. The model first applies target-aware DIN...
author: Yufeng Zhang, Zhengqi Xu, Jiajun Cui
